data.content: Implementation review approved. Original commit 1057826 was thorough: deleted orchestration-view.tsx (1200 lines), breakdown-prompt.ts, orchestration-restage.ts, orchestration-state.ts and associated tests. Cleaned up all UI refs, types, schemas, scripts, README. Correctly preserved 'direct' interaction type in logging/history for backward compat. Found one orphan: orchestration-api.ts (124 lines, zero importers) — deleted in 4027da2. Quality gates: tsc pass, tests pass (1779), lint source-clean, build fails with pre-existing SSR provider error (not a regression).
